description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a smooth, light-colored tabletop and four sturdy legs. The legs are slightly angled outward and connected by horizontal support bars, providing additional stability. The tabletop has a natural wood grain pattern, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. The legs and supports are a mix of lighter and darker wood tones, adding a subtle contrast to the overall design. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, making the table appear functional and minimalist. Its robust construction suggests it is suitable for communal or work-related activities in urban environments.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a smooth, light wood grain top and four angled legs connected by support bars. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with contrasting wood tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs with visible support bars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow depth of the tabletop and the paired leg structure with connecting bars.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the tabletop's depth and leg supports.
